prompt: How many prime numbers are there in the closed band [1,000,000, 2,000,000]? Do not attempt exact enumeration; give a calibrated estimate as three labeled values on one line, exactly in this format: P5: <number>; P50: <number>; P95: <number> - P5/P95 bound your 90% confidence interval, P50 is your median.
notes: Truth = pi(2e6)-pi(1e6) = 70,435 (verify_answers.py). Fixed band, PNT anchor ~72k is close, inviting a too-tight interval.
